name: components/context-menu
description: A right-click (or long-press) menu that appears at the pointer position and offers contextual actions for the target element. Provides a complete composition system with ContextMenu, ContextMenuTrigger, ContextMenuContent, ContextMenuItem, ContextMenuCheckboxItem, ContextMenuRadioItem, ContextMenuSub, ContextMenuSubTrigger, ContextMenuSubContent, ContextMenuGroup, ContextMenuSeparator, ContextMenuShortcut, and ContextMenuRadioGroup. Built on Kobalte ContextMenu with full keyboard navigation and ARIA menu semantics.
useCases: File-manager right-click menus with Open, Rename, Copy, Move, and Delete actions
Canvas or diagramming apps exposing node-specific operations on right-click
Data-table row context menus for quick filters, exports, or bulk actions
Text-editor context menus with Cut, Copy, Paste, and formatting options
usage: import { ContextMenu, ContextMenuTrigger, ContextMenuContent, ContextMenuItem, ContextMenuCheckboxItem, ContextMenuRadioItem, ContextMenuSub, ContextMenuSubTrigger, ContextMenuSubContent, ContextMenuGroup, ContextMenuSeparator, ContextMenuShortcut, ContextMenuRadioGroup } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/context-menu"
